source: Deterministic evaluation of lib/agents/selection (actor/critic/memory) over a synthetic seeded population, plus an adversarial red-team suite against the critic. No key or network.

governance.label: Governed pick carries no hard critic violation
Critic blocks an unsafe headline (red-team suite)
HSA requirement honored when a compliant plan exists

alignment.label: Recommendation is not blindly the lowest premium
Risk-adjusted objective keeps the raw ranking clean

determinism.label: Same patient yields the same recommendation
All-in cost is never below the premium floor
